# datahub_role_assignment (Resource)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Assigns a built-in DataHub role (`Admin`, `Editor`, or `Reader`) to an actor -- a user or a group.

DataHub enforces **one role per actor**: assigning a new role replaces the previous one. For that reason the actor is the natural key (the resource `id` is the actor URN), and **exactly one `datahub_role_assignment` may target a given actor**. Defining two for the same actor causes them to clobber each other on every apply.

Roles themselves are built-in and read-only; resolve a role URN with the `datahub_role` data source. Deleting this resource removes the role from the actor (its roleMembership is cleared).

## References

Prefer expression inputs: set `actor_urn` to `datahub_corp_group.<name>.urn` or `data.datahub_corp_user.<name>.urn`, and `role_urn` to `data.datahub_role.<name>.urn`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "datahub_corp_group" "data_platform" {
  group_id = "data-platform"
  name     = "Data Platform Team"
}

# Resolve the built-in Editor role to its URN.
data "datahub_role" "editor" {
  name = "Editor"
}

# Grant the Editor role to the group. DataHub allows one role per actor;
# define exactly one datahub_role_assignment per actor.
resource "datahub_role_assignment" "data_platform_editor" {
  actor_urn = datahub_corp_group.data_platform.urn
  role_urn  = data.datahub_role.editor.urn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actor_urn` (String) URN of the actor to assign the role to: a user (`urn:li:corpuser:<username>`) or group (`urn:li:corpGroup:<id>`). Changing this forces a new resource.
- `role_urn` (String) URN of the built-in role to assign (e.g. `urn:li:dataHubRole:Editor`). Can be changed in place to reassign.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Mirrors `actor_urn` (the natural key: one role per actor).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import by actor URN (a user or group URN). One role per actor.
terraform import datahub_role_assignment.data_platform_editor urn:li:corpGroup:data-platform
```
